entry.title: Re: Instance creation for apiportal-apiaccess plan in btp trial fails
entry.content: Same issue with the trial account, did you manage to resolve it?

entry.title: How to monitor Communication Arrangments via Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Is it possible to monitor Communication Arrangements for disconnection and inactivity aside from Technical Monitoring Cockpit and Captured ABAP Statistics Records from S/4 tenants? For expiring certificates, that can be monitored already from CALM Health Monitoring.

 

Thanks,

entry.title: Add objectives through Continuous Performance Management without access to the Objectives page?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We have are using both the Continuous Performance and Objectives functionalities in SAP SuccessFactors. We want employees to manage and add their objectives solely through Continuous Performance, without giving them access to the Objectives page. After some testing, we found that it seems impossible to provide access to add and edit objectives through Continuous Performance without also giving access to the Objectives page.

Has anyone encountered this scenario, and is there a way to achieve this within the current system setup?

There is an option to only use Objective plans. Because with the latest release, it appears we can give access to Continuous Performance Management data without accessing the CPM page itself. This would allow employees to create activities straight from the the objectives plan page, so they can maintain everything within one module. 

Still we prefer the option to only use the CPM page..

entry.title: ‌🇲🇾‌ SAP SuccessFactors Value & Innovation in Practice (VIP) Day 2025
entry.content:
Join us for an exclusive SAP SuccessFactors Community event where you'll get the latest insights into HR and technology trends, explore the newest SAP feature updates, and connect with fellow HR operations and IT administration professionals.

Highlights Include:

  • Statutory updates and e-services for Malaysia presented by SAP Globalization

  • An exciting AI showcase

  • Networking opportunities with HR and IT leaders

Who Should Attend:
HR & IT Leaders, Admin Users, and Business Process Owners for Payroll

Don’t miss this opportunity to stay ahead in the evolving HR tech landscape!

You can find the agenda and list of speakers here.

Registration link

entry.title: Business Round – Edição de Maio
entry.content:
O happy hour mais conectado do ecossistema de inovação está chegando!
Na segunda-feira, dia 12 de maio, a partir das 18h30, o Bagdad Café Curitiba será o palco de mais uma edição do Business Round — um encontro leve, dinâmico e cheio de conexões que impulsionam ideias e negócios.

O que te espera:
Pitchs de negócios
Open mic para divulgar sua iniciativa
Networking com propósito
Apresentação cultural
Troca de experiências e contatos reais

Ingresso social: 1kg de alimento não perecível
R. Padre Anchieta, 262 – Mercês, Curitiba

Garanta sua vaga e venha fazer parte dessa rede de conexões:
https://bit.ly/Business_Round_Maio_2025

Conecte-se com quem empreende, compartilha e transforma!

entry.title: Re: Quick Actions for Joule
entry.content:
Is there an answer for this ? I have checked and at some point SAP states that we should create Quick Actions, but have found documentation stating that NO configuration is required .... can we have an answer please ?

Link where SAP states no configuration is required: All Use Cases Upgraded to New Conversational Experience in Joule - January 2025 | SAP Help Portal

HI Raymond,
This SAP Note is not relevant to our system.

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager GIS Geocoding
entry.content: Hi Chris, this could be an issue with the shadow tables not been read by this method. Can you check is SAP Note is in your system: https://me.sap.com/notes/3450235

entry.title: Make Application Job Templates available to specific user(s) only? Anno 2025
entry.content:
Related old question is Solved: How to share application job templates to specific... - SAP Community, however that old question dates 2017 and is answered with an accepted solution from 2017.

What is the current state on making an Application Job Templates available to a specific user only? In the year 2025.

In Content Administration, we can not change the author of a (private) Application Job Template, correct? Hence, is the functionality to be achieved by using 'Job Definitions'? A Job Definition can be assigned to a single/specific user(s) only. Do I understand correctly that a Job Definition does not have an effect on the SAP IBP Excel Add-In's 'Application Jobs' section? Such is my understanding, based on the mentioning only of the web-UI Monitor Application Jobs and Planner Workspaces apps in SAP Help > SAP IBP > Job Definitions, where the Excel Add-In is ommited?

entry.title: Re: Intrastat Declaration Job Not Picking Up Entries in S...
entry.content: Does your POI have at least one plant assigned to it? I did have this problem and the assignment of the plant solved it. The business partner is more like a contact person, but does not have an influence on the selection.

entry.title: Re: Can you import decimal values for competency?
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

If you're trying to import overall competency score in a PM form, I believe it should allow rating with decimal value (e.g. 2.0, 3.00). However, it will only accept value that exists in the rating scale associated to the form. You may need to adjust the rating scale used in your PM form.

Thanks,

Michelle

entry.title: Re: Handover of test cases to test from one user to anoth...
entry.content:
Dear Ricardo,

Thank you so much for your response!

What about the 2 below questions:

- How can we handover a certain test case/execution to another?

- Do we only have the possibility to add one tester in a test plan? waht if a had more testers?

Thank you in adnvance!

Kind regards,

Rayane

entry.title: Re: Easy way to access OData services via btp destinations in a python flask app
entry.content:
FYI for anyone reading this in the future, you don't need to concatenate client_id & client_secret and add the basic auth header. Making the authentication request to the destination service via API only requires that you add client_id and client_secret in the form body, as per the help portal documentation.

i.e you can simplify the auth flow to the below snippet. Adding the basic auth header will result in a 401 response.

# Read the environment variables  
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  env = AppEnv()
  dest_service = env.get_service(name=sDestinationService)

# Request a JWT token to access the destination service
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  headers = {'content-type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'}
  form = [('client_id', dest_service.credentials["clientid"] ),('client_secret', dest_service.credentials["clientsecret"] ), ('grant_type', 'client_credentials')]
  
  url = dest_service.credentials['url'] +"/oauth/token"
  headers = {
    'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'
  }

  response = requests.request("POST", url, headers=headers, data=form)

entry.title: Re: Error when migrating PI/PO interface to Cloud Integration
entry.content: @Prasanthi I am pretty sure SAP will be able to provide us a solution soon. However I am amazed to see how exact same service with XML-JSON converter seems to work for me. Since I am doing migration, some of the services with XML-JSON converter seems to be working for me, while others not.

entry.title: Re: Interviewer added to interview schedule from the recr...
entry.content:
The feature permission granted in the XML is for scheduling interviews. If the recruiter has this feature permission in the XML, the recruiting team will automatically receive the same access to schedule interviews. However, interview assessments are not linked to this feature permission. If you add the recruiting team as interviewers while scheduling the interview, they will automatically gain access to the Interview Central tab to complete the interview feedback. The Talent Intelligence Hub should not have any impact on this.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: SAP PRD QUERY
entry.content: Hello, I didn't understand very well. Serial Number vs Product Parts: is it a simple list that you need? Should it "tie" to other serial numbers (of parts)? or product vs model, product vs BOM... While generating a quote... ask the customer.. if it is not in SAP? What do you mean by that? If you want to associate an order with a serial number, you must always know which serial number the order is being placed for (the customer may have several), and even if you have the serial number history for that customer, you will not know which one they are buying for if it is not specified. Or are you referring to serial numbers that have not been registered (old process) and you want to associate them with the history now (at the time of the sale of the parts)?

entry.title: Re: How to delete all glossary entries at once in Process...
entry.content:
Good day Mariane,

Thank you for sharing your inquiry on the SAP Community.  In response to your inquiry, you can delete a category, in which it will remove all dictionary entries in the category at once.
Please note: some categories are default (Organization, Activities, Documents, etc.) and they cannot be removed, therefore you wouldn't be able to do this in bulk.  

Kind regards,

KantriceD

entry.title: Re: How to reverse COP1/COP2 created HU for the Process O...
entry.content: You can use the HUMO transaction to delete the Handling Units. Afterwards you have the option to create new ones.

entry.title: SAC manual import and conenction with Live data
entry.content:
Hello,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am reaching out to seek your advice on the best practices for importing manual data into SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) on a monthly basis and subsequently joining this data with live SAP data connections. Specifically, I have a few questions that I would appreciate your insights on:

  1. Optimal Storage Path for Manual Data:

    • Could you recommend the most suitable storage path for the manual data? For instance, would using Google Drive or another cloud storage service be ideal for this purpose? I am looking for a solution that ensures easy access and integration with SAC.

  2. Best Medium for Automatic Data Integration:

    • What would be the best medium to automatically join the manual data with the live SAP data every month? The structure of the manual data will remain consistent, with only the values changing each month. I am interested in a method that minimizes manual intervention and ensures seamless integration.

  3. Monthly Data Refresh:

    • Both the manual data and the live SAP data will need to be refreshed once a month. Could you provide guidance on the most efficient way to set up this monthly refresh for both data sources within SAC?

Your expertise and suggestions on these matters would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your assistance.

#SAC #SACSTORY #SAP #SAPANALYTICAL

entry.title: Payment Method couldn't be found during Bank Transfer
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm facing a problem when I try to create a bank transfer in the app Make Bank Transfer. What could be the problem? Where can I add the payment methods so that they're going to be visible in this app?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Replace all the Non printable special Characters in SAP HANA table
entry.content: This works for me!

entry.title: Is it possible to have a relative selection for currency conversion date and use a date KUT field?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

for C4C reports with currency there are always the fields "Display Currency - Conversion Date" and "Display Currency". 

For the Conversion Date I can chose between a absolute value and a relative date (today, yesterday etc.) 

Is it possible to use another date field for the conversion date? We created a KUT field with date format for the date, when it was invoiced. This should be date the used for the currency conversion. 

I seems that this is not possible in the Standard. But here the question, just to be sure I dont miss any option... 

Thanks a lot!

Best regards, Deborah

entry.title: Re: How To USE QAC2?
entry.content:
That is very helpful. Thank you for the walk through.

After Some more trial and error it looks like the location in the yellow field was the correct destination location to input and that as you said the location and the material but first be set up as a pair before the material can actually be transferred.

entry.title: WBS Allocation KSW1 and KSW5
entry.content:
I am trying to allocate from WBS to another WBS, But i get an error saying No valid sender cost centers could be found.  In Receiver and Sender i have not selected Cost center. i have selected only WBS

Error Message :


Check the definition of the cycle in the maintenance transaction for CCA: Actual Periodic Reposting. No valid sender cost centers could be found to match your selection.

If you use the sender rules "Posted amounts" or "Posted quantities", check whether records exist in the database for the criteria you entered (cost element, version...)

During indirect activity allocation with the sender rule "posted quantities", you should also note that only the difference between the planned/posted activity allocation and the scheduled activity quantity is allocated. If you entered activity types as sender, you should at this point also check the activity type category. For those quantities posted with an activity type of category 1 (manual entry, manual allocation) no indirect activity allocation is possible.

1. If this is an allocation in the FI/FI-SL area, the problem could also be due to the inheritance logic for FI-SL totals tables, whose "Inheritance of sender based on the receiver" indicator is activated in the "Partner object update" view (T811U-INHERSRC). These are tables that were installed before Release 4.6A.
Use transaction GCA8 to check this, and see the section on:
Inheritance Logic for Allocations

then correct the affected cycle, if required.

entry.title: Re: OLE2 objects: Select several ranges at once
entry.content:
Yes, I had already tried what you mentioned—creating macros in Visual Basic and attempting to translate them to OLE—but it doesn’t work.


*   If I use a single cell or range its working:
*    CALL METHOD OF lo_worksheet 'range' = lo_range
*      EXPORTING
*      #1 = 'A1:B1'.
*    CALL METHOD OF lo_range 'select'.
*    CALL METHOD OF lo_application 'selection' = lo_selection.
*    SET PROPERTY OF lo_selection 'locked' = 1.

*   But if I use several ranges, then its not working:
    CALL METHOD OF lo_worksheet 'range' = lo_range
      EXPORTING
      #1 = 'A1,B1,C1'. "Or 'A1:B1, C2, D3:E4'
    CALL METHOD OF lo_range 'select'.
    CALL METHOD OF lo_application 'selection' = lo_selection.
    SET PROPERTY OF lo_selection 'locked' = 1.

I read the link you shared, but it doesn’t provide a solution either. I could use the UNION method to combine ranges, but that method only takes two arguments , and I would need to call it many times in my scenario. What I’m trying to avoid is making so many calls between SAP and Excel, to reduce the use of those FLUSH functions as much as possible. That’s why I wanted to pass a string with all the ranges separated by commas (,), which works fine in VBA, but doesn’t seem to work correctly in OLE.

EDIT: Union accept a lot of arguments:
expresión. Unión (Arg1, Arg2, Arg3, Arg4, Arg5, Arg6, Arg7, Arg8, Arg9, Arg10, Arg11, Arg12, Arg13, Arg14, Arg15, Arg16, Arg17, Arg18, Arg19, Arg20, Arg21, Arg22, Arg23, Arg24, Arg25, Arg26, Arg27, Arg28, Arg29, Arg30)
https://learn.microsoft.com/es-es/office/vba/api/excel.application.union

But I have huge excel files, dont know if this amount of argument is enough. I'll try.

entry.title: Re: Understanding Cloud Credits and API Call Charges in S...
entry.content:
After facing unexpected API call charges and digging into SAP Integration Suite's pricing model, I decided to put together this summary to help others who might be navigating similar questions.

This guide includes:

  • A breakdown of how SAP counts messages (based on SAP Note 2942344)

  • Real-world integration flows with estimated monthly volumes

  • A cost analysis using the Standard Plan

  • Tips for optimizing message usage to reduce costs

I hope this is helpful for others evaluating or using SAP Integration Suite, especially in public cloud or hybrid landscapes. Feedback and discussion welcome!

SAP Integration Suite: Overview and Pricing Model

1. Integration Suite Overview and Technical Context

This document provides a practical overview of SAP Integration Suite's pricing and usage model, including real-world message volume examples, cost implications, and optimization strategies for minimizing operating costs.

SAP Integration Suite is an enterprise-grade integration platform-as-a-service (iPaaS) that enables seamless connection of applications, data, and processes within and outside organizations. It provides pre-built integration scenarios (iFlows) to accelerate integration tasks.

Key Features:

  • Build integration scenarios with Cloud Integration
  • API management for discovering, governing, and securing APIs
  • Event-driven architecture with Business Events
  • Non-SAP connectivity via Open Connectors
  • Interface and mapping implementation with Integration Advisor
  • Trading Partner Management for B2B integrations
  • OData provisioning for SAP Business Suite data access
  • Migration assessments from SAP Process Orchestration
  • Hybrid integration support for cloud and on-premises
  • Data exchange within data spaces

What is a Message?

A 'message' in SAP Integration Suite refers to data units processed through integration flows (iFlows) or API calls. Licensing and costs are calculated based on message volume and size. Messages are counted in 250 KB increments; larger messages are rounded up.

  • 2 MB message = 9 messages (2048 KB ÷ 250 KB = 8.192 → rounded to 9)
  • Retries and splits count as additional messages
  • All tenants (DEV, QAS, PROD) count individually
  • SAP counts messages in 250 KB increments. If aggregated message size exceeds 250 KB, it is rounded up to the nearest multiple of 250 KB. (Source: SAP Note 2942344 – SAP Integration Suite - Message Metric Definition)
  • Prebuilt SAP-to-SAP iFlows from SAP Business Accelerator Hub are exempt from metered charges if unmodified.

Below is a sample iflow with estimated monthly message count and how it could be optimized.

 

Integration Flow

Example Use Case

Message Behavior

Est. Monthly Volume

Optimized Monthly Volume

Optimization Explanation

OES → SAP Public Cloud

Sales Orders pushed to SAP

1 message per sales order

20,000

20,000

Each sales order is counted as one message; no batching assumed.

PIM → SAP Public Cloud

Product master updates/Catalog Sync

1 per product or batched

15,000

100

Batch product updates daily instead of per product; reduces to ~100/month.

SAP Public Cloud → Cloud ALM

System logs, test execution sync

1 per event/log

600

600

Event-based logs; no batching possible.

Shipping App ↔ SAP

Tracking updates with carriers

1 per update

30,000

30,000

Real-time updates; no batching possible.

SAP ↔ Vendor Portal

PO, ASN, Invoice exchange

1 per document

9,000

9,000

Documents typically not batchable.

SAP → eCommerce Platform

Product Catalog Sync

1 per product sync batch

1,000

50

Daily batch updates; 50/month.

eCommerce → SAP

Sales Order Creation

1 per order

10,000

10,000

Real-time order processing.

eCommerce → SAP

Inventory Check

1 per stock query

100,000

5,000

Hourly batch checks to reduce volume.

SAP → eCommerce Platform

Order Status Update

1 per update/order

5,000

1,000

Daily batched updates; estimated 1,000.

eCommerce ↔ SAP

Customer Info & Credit Check

1 per customer/query

20,000

5,000

Batch registrations/checks; estimated 500.

2. Pricing Models Overview

SAP Integration Suite offers three primary commercial models: Subscription-based, CPEA (Cloud Platform Enterprise Agreement), BTPEA (BTP Enterprise Agreement), and PAYG (Pay-As-You-Go).

Plan Name

Included Messages

Tenants

Use Case

Annual Cost (USD)

Starter

50,000

1

Entry-level; limited iFlows

$18,744

Standard

10,000

1

Full integration capabilities

$57,900

Premium

10 million

4

Enterprise-grade + AI

$318,204

Messages Add-on

10,000 per block

N/A

Additional messages

$75.96 per block

3. Total Cost Analysis Example

So, now when we take optimized monthly volume from sample iflow message count and standard Plan from Commercial pricing model. We would pay $5432.68. You can see detailed breakdown clearly showing the per-block cost calculation

Description

Value

Standard Plan Base Monthly Cost

$4,825.00

Included Messages

10,000

Total Optimized Monthly Message Volume

80,750

Additional Messages (Beyond Included)

70,750

Additional Blocks Required

8

Cost per Additional Block

$75.96

Additional Blocks Cost (8 blocks x $75.96/block)

$607.68

Total Monthly Operational Cost

$5,432.68

4. Cost Optimization Recommendations

  • Batch updates (product catalogs, master data) daily.
  • Replace real-time queries with periodic batch processing.
  • Monitor consumption regularly via SAP for Me and SAP BTP Cockpit.
  • Use delta updates instead of full syncs to reduce message counts.

Sources:

  • SAP Discovery Center: https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/serviceCatalog/integration-suite
  • SAP Integration Suite Pricing: https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/integration-suite/pricing.html
  • SAP Note 2942344 – Message Metric Definition: https://me.sap.com/notes/2942344
  • A SAP Note: 2903776 - SAP Integration Suite – Service Plans and Upgrade Paths
  • What Is the Consumption-Based Commercial Model?
  • SAP Integration Suite Pricing

I compiled this based on real-world usage and research — feel free to reuse or improve. Would love to hear how others manage message volumes and optimize costs!

entry.title: How do I make a field from a child entity available as non-default in a list report?
entry.content:
I am in the BTP ABAP Environment working on some RAP annotations. I have a RAP Object that looks like this:

define root view entity ROOT
composition [0..*] of CHILD as _child
{
  key uuid,
...
      _child
}
define view entity CHILD
association to parent ROOT as_root on CHILD.rootuuid = ROOT.uuid
{
  key uuid,
      rootuuid,
      CoolValue,
      _root
}

In the annotations of the ROOT, I know I can add fields from my child like so:

annotate entity ROOT with
{
  @ui: {
    lineItem: [{ position: 10, value: '_child.CoolValue' }],
    selectionField: [{ position: 10, element: '_child.CoolValue' }]
  }
  _child;
}

These annotations work great if I want the field to be displayed by default.

My requirement is to have the field available, but not displayed. So for filter fields, I want to see the field in 'Adapt Filters', and for the list I want to view the field in the view settings' Columns list. But by default they should not be displayed.

If I remove the annotations, the field 'CoolValue' is not available at all (because you lose the reference to the field that is important in the child entity). How can I adjust this implementation to make the field available, but not shown by default?

entry.title: Re: Materials to learn SAP Cloud Indentity Services, IAS,...
entry.content:
Hi @DavitMelkonyan 
We also offer a live session Introduction to Cloud Identity Authentication and Cloud Identity Provisioning
Please also check the Exploring the Fundamentals of SAP System Security  where you find a lesson 
Describing the Identity Authentication Service 

in our SAP Developer Center you can find the tutorial Connect Azure Active Directory to Identity Authentication Service where you can learn how to establish trust between your Identity Authentication service and Azure Active Directory

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Packaging Instruction creation and assignment
entry.content: There is no fixed responsibility for such activities.  Still I would say, you can complete the process, ask the respective team to validate assuming, the understanding within the internal colleagues are fine.   In another way, you are only reducing their work load and I don't think, they would object for this.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA supervisior dimension older configuration...
entry.content:
Hello, I understand that, but example sql above still returned the hierarchy, why is it returning a hierarchy when the SQL doesn't define one and Its the only dimension using manager id column.

Also, I deleted the hierarchy supervisor dimension created a new analysis supervisor dimension added the following simple SQL as a test and ran initial process and sync artifact afterwards successfully.

SELECT DISTINCT
    MANAGER_ID
FROM "[%ODS_DATABASE%]"."EMP_JOB_INFO_T"

Added dimension options( note manually maintained SQL)

Yet, in edit Hierarchies, I still see the manager ids in supervisor dimension bundled in a hierarchy like structure, is this normal behavior ? See image below returned as result of SQL above ( no other manager ID dimensions exist in the system)

Thank you!

Edit: to add to above, I deleted the above dimension and created supervisor analysis dimension using manager ID and NONE as the query option with no SQL whatsoever, ran initial process and sync afterwards  on analysis, measures and structural dimensions and I still see the hierarchy above as the result.

entry.title: Re: OLE2 objects: Select several ranges at once
entry.content:
Have you considered saving the VBA commands into a VBscript file, and then executing the script on the application server?

As you lay out this issue, you are executing this VBA code on a copy of Excel resident on your SAPGUI host PC. This copy of Excel has the XLSX template installed. Using OLE to call the instance of Excel is low performance, but it gives you great flexibility in the content of the commands, ranges in this case.

I have had great success in writing VBscript commands into a text file, saving it in the working directory defined by SAPGUI, and then executing it on the PC.

Inside the VBscript you can read any number of command line parameters in the WScript.Arguments object. Pass these parameters to the VBscript using the PARAMETER string in cl_gui_frontend_services=>execute.

This is a workaround, but the performance is vastly superior to OLE.

DATA: strcommand TYPE string.

  strcommand = |"{ w_path }{ 'Z_SCRIPT.vbs'(vbs) }"|
            && | "{ p_file }"|
            && | "{ p_tab }"|
            && | "{ w_path }"|.

* Run script on Win32 WorkStation
  CALL METHOD cl_gui_frontend_services=>execute
    EXPORTING
      application            = 'WScript'
      parameter              = strcommand
      synchronous            = 'X'
.

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA supervisior dimension older configuration...
entry.content: Hello, please see my reply in answers as I couldn't add images in comments. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Propagation for Webdynpro

entry.title: Re: Error Message FZ 376 : Error in withholding tax calcu...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking the question in the SAP Community blog.

I hope this will help you solve your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Payment Method couldn't be found during Bank Transfer
entry.content:
Hello,

please make sure the configuration is done in SSCUI 101045 Set Up Bank Determination for Payment Transactions.

Regards,
Alina

entry.title: Re: 🇪🇸 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Madrid, Spain)

Hi!

One question. I signed up to attend the course, but unless I'm mistaken, I haven't yet received a response as to whether I've been accepted or not. Will you let us know later?

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Provision users from Microsoft Azure AD to SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication
entry.content:
I'm not being able to import the group members from Azure, did anyone had been able to do so? This is the transformation I'm using inside the groups mapping:

Source: 
"group": {
"ignore": false,
"mappings": [
......
{
"sourcePath": "$.members",
"preserveArrayWithSingleElement": true,
"optional": true,
"targetPath": "$.members"
},
{
"ignore": true,
"constant": "value",
"optional": true,
"targetPath": "$.members[*].mail",
"type": "rename"
},

Target: 
"group": {
"ignore": false,
"mappings": [
....
{
"sourcePath": "$.members[*]",
"preserveArrayWithSingleElement": true,
"optional": true,
"targetPath": "$.members",
"functions": [
{
"function": "resolveEntityIds",
"entityType": "user",
"applyOnAttribute": "value",
"assignToAttribute": "value"
}
]
}

Thanks!

entry.title: hide pages to an usergroup
entry.content:
I have this requirement:

hide a set of pages of storefront to b2b customers part of a specific userGroup.

the pages interested are part of basic storefront and b2bAccelleratorAddon (order history, PDP, ...).

My idea is inhibit the access to these pages with a CMSUserGroupRestriction. I created it but it doesn't work.

Searching on web I read that this type of restriction works only on content page. Is this the reason? Or there something wrong on my restriction?

entry.title: IAS Logging Questions
entry.content:
I have a customer that want to be able to pull Authentication logs from IAS via API. Is this possible?

Also, what is the retention policy for the IAS logs?

 

Thanks in advance.

Phillip

entry.title: Re: BAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE is not updating the Net Price in...
entry.content: Then wait for tomorrow (actual PST)

entry.title: S/4 HANA migration from ECC on HANA DB
entry.content:
Dear Gurus.

When perfroming mirgation from SAP ERP ( ECC) running on HANADB to S/4 HANA, SUM should not use R3load for migration to HANA from non-HANA DB, cause source DB is already HANA . Is it correct?

Regards

Vladimir

entry.title: Multi VAT on single invoice line
entry.content:
Hello,

We have suppliers who are posting invoice through Ariba Network for a simple service PO, these are PO with single line item for services. On Invoice posting , Suppliers are using multiple VAT components e.g. charging VAT 8.1 % and 2.6 %.

When we get these invoice in Ariba invoicing, there is no option to assign tax code on these split VAT lines. Instead, I just get an option to assign a VAT code on the total VAT, which is not accurate. Anyone else had this issue with Ariba invoicing? What can be done to assign appropriate VAT codes on individual split lines?

 

 

Ashish

entry.title: Re: Error Message FZ 376 : Error in withholding tax calcu...
entry.content:
Dear Jeremy,

Thank you for your response.

The link you shared refers to notes that are specific to ECC. I was not able to find anything related to S/4HANA. I will open a ticket with SAP to evaluate the update of the notes mentioned.

Best regards,

FabioGC

entry.title: Re: Romania E invoicing XML converter to PDF copy
entry.content:
Hi Krishna,
use table  EDOPROCFUNCASGV.
For key ROINVIC. Add 
21  Menu   Menu_Display
22  Button  Display_Edoc            MENU_DISPLAY
23  Button  Display_PDFPROC   MENU_DISPLAY

The step 23 will add an option to see and download the pdf (converted XML).
Regards

entry.title: Hi Experts, Any one could suggest how can i prepare KDS document for Preventive maintenance in SAP
entry.content: Hi Experts, Any one could suggest how can i prepare KDS document for Preventive maintenance in SAP

entry.title: Re: Error Message FZ 376 : Error in withholding tax calcu...
entry.content: Did you read this KBA: 3429552 - 051 Item cannot be paid: Error in withholding tax calculation

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content: Thanks @jeetendrakapase , with the previous replies on the Delta Table/Delta sharing capability. Can I conclude that, Standard Data products in Foundation service use Open source protocol of Delta table/Delta share with SPARK compute. Also Custom Data products in Datasphere use the same open source protocol of Delta table/Delta share with SPARK. But HANA Data lake standalone uses SQL on Files and Delta Share Adapters(SAP protocol) for this purpose.

entry.title: Custom message missing in Response Headers from a Post/Create request
entry.content:
There is a property I need from the response headers in a SAPUI5 app, which is "sap-message". It carries some information after a create request on the model in the SAPUI5 front-end.
On the app with a service pointing to Dev, I do get this property ("sap-message") attached to the headers, as you can see in the below.

The problem is that on the app that is on QA this property is not there, not just that it doesn't have a value, it is totally absent. What might be the cause of this and how to fix it?

Any help with greatly be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: HCM Brasil: Crédito do Trabalhador - eConsignado
entry.content:
Boa tarde Fernando.

Em termos de eSocial é necessário enviar as rubricas no evento S-1010 e posteriormente nos eventos de remuneração (S-1200, S-2299 e S-2399), preenchendo também o grupo descFolha.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi everyone! I’m the Chief Marketing Officer at WalkMe, and I’m thrilled to be part of the SAP Community once again. I couldn’t be more excited about the incredible opportunity ahead of us to bring digital adoption to the heart of the SAP ecosystem.

This is actually a return for me. I spent 10 great years at SAP before moving on about a decade ago. It’s been both nostalgic and energizing to reconnect with so many familiar faces. I’m looking forward to collaborating, learning, and growing with this vibrant community.

entry.title: Akbank Davet Kodu Nedir ve Nasıl Kullanılır?
entry.content: Akbank davet kodu: "100010011575413" ile Akbank mobil uygulaması üzerinden kolayca müşteri olabilir, kredi kartınızı aldıktan sonra 200 TL chip para kazanabilirsiniz. Kampanya, Akbank Kart, Axess veya Wings kredi kartı başvurusu yapan yeni müşteriler için geçerlidir.

entry.title: Re: New integration flow design guidelines covering Exactly Once In Order pattern
entry.content:
Hi Alex,

I would like to re-use the existing pipelines(+partner directory entries) while leveraging EOIO queues for certain interfaces. How can we do that? Looking forward to an update to integration pipelines to support EOIO scenarios 🙂

Thanks!

entry.title: Is it possible within SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public to have sales invoice approval workflows?
entry.content: We do not use sales orders but would like to have an approval workflow for approving sales invoices before they are posted. Is there a way to do this within S/4 Public cloud?

entry.title: How to configure roles to ensure segregation of duties for managing payments?
entry.content: I understand specific administration roles will be able to set up approval paths for payments with S/4 HANA Cloud Public. However, what controls are there to ensure the same role is unable to change bank account details of payees?

entry.title: SAP Business Data cloud custom Data products/Packages or insight apps ?
entry.content:
Hello, I have a couple questions related to SAP BDC.

Is it possible for SAP partners or clients to develop their own insight apps?

Similarly, is it possible to create custom Data products and packages and share with Databricks ? For example, at the moment SuccessFactors does not have data products or dedicated insight apps. Would we be able to create our own data products in datasphere by using traditional odata connection and then sharing the tables/views with Databricks for some ML use cases ?

If not, is it possible to share normal Datapshere analytical views, local tables or facts with DataBricks ?

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: @Adriel_Sanchez it sounds like welcome (Back!) is in order. Great to hear your enthusiasm and excitement. The SAP ecosystem has so many wonderful people! I am responsible for the SAP Mentors program and my wonderful colleague @KatherineKenneally is responsible for the SAP Champions program. We look forward to getting everyone engaged on incredible topics and SAP products!

entry.title: Re: Adopting SuccessFactors Talent intelligence hub: Where to Begin?

entry.title: Re: New READ TABLE Syntax Results in SY-SUBRC = 4 – Why Is It Not Recognized?
entry.content: Refer to ABAP Keyword Documentation: https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abentable_expressions.htm. Nowhere is said that sy-subrc is modified (except if used by the form ASSIGN itab[ xxx ])).

entry.title: Re: HelloI need some help in Aggregating rows where i am...
entry.content: Please don't post an answer because an answer is to be a solution. Use a comment instead.

So, i need some guide or documents regarding this.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere graphical view deployment issue
entry.content: I attempted to re-deploy several views with design-time errors, except for one. I encountered the same error on that specific view. SAP is investigating the issue.

entry.title: Re: HelloI need some help in Aggregating rows where i am getting cumulative aggregation
entry.content: You're right, only one loop is needed. Do DATA(LT_AGGREG) = LT_FILTERED. Then do a loop with N varying from the penultimate line (lines( lt_aggreg ) - 1) to 1 and calculate LT_AGGREG[ N ] = LT_AGGREG[ N ] + LT_AGGREG[ N + 1 ].

entry.title: Re: MyInbox - Refresh tasklist from own component in deta...
entry.content: Maybe it's because the task doesn't exist, once you completed. I would try another method, goaling the list refresh instead of task update.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to edit but not post supplier invoice...
entry.content:
Hello Bengi,
No problem, that's something else, of course.

I can think of two possibilities: In the Public Cloud, there are predefined Business Roles that define the authorizations to park and post invoices:
- Accounts Payable Accountant: This role is typically fit-out with the authorization to park and post invoices. It has access to the Fiori app "Post invoice"

- Accounts Payable Processor: This role could only allow users to process and park invoices, but not to post them.


You would then have to clarify this with the people who are responsible for the authorizations.

 

The other option would be to define a workflow.
To do this, you would have to create or activate a new workflow in the Fiori app "Manage Workflow Scenarios" - Parked Invoice Apporval Workflow.

First, select a name and a workflow type: - "Parket Supplier Invoices"
Then define the start condition.

And then you add the approval steps. The individual steps must then also be defined again.

For example like this.

 

I hope this helps you a little.
Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Empowering Through Learning: Sandra’s Path to SAP Champion
entry.content: I loved it and I would like to complement the post saying that in Teched I met some developer Advocates I admire so much and am a fan !! that was the best experience ever. Thanks for this amazing Follow Up post about me!!!

entry.title: Re: IAS Logging Questions
entry.content:
Hi @PhillipButts 

Please refer to below blogs which will provide more details on how to extract the IAS logs and integration with SAP Audit Log viewer , In the blog there are links which refers to help doc to the retention period.

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/integrating-sap-cloud-identity-services-identity-authentication-ias-with/ba-p/14040078

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/how-to-enable-sap-audit-log-viewer-service-to-collect-all-audit-logs-from/ba-p/14037435

@guidoreboredo 

you can refer to the below blog which was introduced 2months - Central Store Based Provisioning based on groups which support MS Entra (Azure) ..

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/central-store-based-provisioning-the-ultimate-solution-for-application-user/ba-p/14031073

entry.title: Re: Using VSCode to write Groovy Scripts for SAP CI (CPI)
entry.content:
@David_Davis  or any other terminal, yes, in this case it does not have a graphical view.
An alternative is that you can put it to write the output to a file if that makes it easier for you.

entry.title: Re: creation profile assignment in vendor master
entry.content:
Hello Jerrysam, 

The direct assignment of the "Release Creation Profile" in the supplier master record is not possible in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud via the standard applications. It is advisable to consider alternative methods such as using the "Manage Supplier Master Data" app with alternative data, customizing the user interface or checking user roles and authorizations

So in the Fior App " Manage Supplier Master Data"

You can make some settings unter Purchasing Organization 

I hope this helps you a little, otherwise we can also look at a concrete example from you.

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Empowering Through Learning: Sandra’s Path to SAP Champion
entry.content:
Awesome!!!!!  Sandra is good people, if you don't know her, get to know her.

Cheers,

Rich Heilman

entry.title: Re: IAS Logging Questions
entry.content: Thanks, I have yet to sse the BTP cockpit for ias

entry.title: Re: Is it possible within SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public to ha...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question.

Does Invoice Management process overview answer your question?

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/031c345485b84c8c94265be9ef61d3a8/aaaf480fa29b4ba5a83b3f323f345522.html?locale=en-US

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Bootcamp SAP Business Technology Platform | SAP Future Talent | Spanish
entry.content:
Programa SAP Future Talent: ¡Participa en el programa e inicia tu carrera!

¿Sabías que las soluciones SAP están presentes en más de 84% de todas las transacciones comerciales a nivel global? ¡Ahora tienes la oportunidad de formar parte de este increíble ecosistema e iniciar una carrera como consultor(a) en el mercado de tecnología e innovación!

Bootcamp SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) - ¡100% GR ATUITO en español!

  • Fechas: 27, 29 de mayo y 3, 5, 10 de junio
  • Total: 5 clases

Regístrate para participar: Webinar Registration - Zoom

¡No dejes pasar esta oportunidad única! Asegúrate de registrarte en el enlace antes de que las plazas se agoten.

entry.title: How can I hide a closed/stopped opportunity from salesorders->opportunities->my teams opportunities
entry.content: Within C4C we have an opportunity that is now closed/stopped but appears in the query "my teams opportunities".  Does anyone have any idea how I might be able to remove or hide this opportunity from that view?  (as its status is closed/stopped then I cant see how I can achieve this - the reason to hide it is a sensitve one for our users who see this whenever they access the queue).

entry.title: Re: How do I make a field from a child entity available a...
entry.content:
Hi,

1. What happens if you remove the position from lineitem and selectionfiled? 
lineItem: [ { value: '_child.CoolValue' } ] ... 
2. or something else: 
does it support hidden : true ? 
lineItem: [{ position: 10, value: '_child.CoolValue', hidden: true }] ? 
3. or using
lineItem: [{ position: 10, value: '_child.CoolValue', importance: #LOW, visible: false }]

entry.title: Re: Is it possible within SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public to ha...
entry.content: Thanks Henrike - i believe that is in relation to supplier invoices only not the internal approval of sales invoices

entry.title: SmartFilterBar with Variant-Management. Working with 1.96, not working on 1.108
entry.content:
Hi Community,

i have an fiori freestyle app running on a onPremise SAP-System with SAPUI5-Version 1.96. With variantmanagment i'm able to add properties of my entity to the filter-fields, store values for filters and save it to variants. I'm also able to manage this variants (delete, save-as, ...).

After changing to SAPUI5-Version 1.106 this variant-management is no longer working anymore. i can add properties to the filterbar but this changes are not saved, also using the filters by adding values into the filterfields with operators simply does not work. 
I could not find anything till now in documentation or here in the community-forum nor in sap-notes. 

Does anyone know something about breaking changes? 

Here a snippet where my smarfilterbar is defined in my view.

<smartFilterBar:SmartFilterBar
 id="smartFilterBar"
 liveMode="true"
 entitySet="F4C_CL2WSet"
 persistencyKey="SmartFilter_Explored"
 initialized="onFBInitialized"
 afterVariantLoad="onFBAfterVariantLoad"
 assignedFiltersChanged="onFBAssignedFiltersChanged"
>

This smartfilterbar resides in a headercontent of a ObjectPageLayout.
Additionally i have a Smarttable with the same entityset and which uses the SmartFilterBar for showing the result. Here a snippet of this SmartTable-definiton.

<smartTable:SmartTable										id="smartTable"
entitySet="F4C_CL2WSet"
smartFilterId="smartFilterBar"
useExportToExcel="true"
beforeExport="onBeforeExport"
exportType="UI5Client"
requestAtLeastFields="ClassId,ClassType"
beforeRebindTable="onBeforeRebindTable"
useVariantManagement="true"
useTablePersonalisation="true"
header="{i18n>Belege}"
showRowCount="true"
persistencyKey="Fi4ClsRPS"										enableAutoBinding="true"
class="sapUiResponsiveContentPadding"
fitContainer="true"
tableType="{= ${device>/system/desktop} ? 'Table' : 'ResponsiveTable'}"
demandPopin="true">
 <!-- ..Table definition inside.. -->
</smartTable:SmartTable>

Any ideas out there?

kind regards
Matthias

entry.title: Service Quotations (Requested Start Date - End Date)
entry.content:
Good afternoon 

Please your help!

In the app Manage Service Quotation (from SAP S4 HANA Public Edition) when I finished creating a Service Quotation I start to notice that the original date that I enter is different from the end date, as the system updates it to 2 days before the original date. Why this happen? And also why my posting date is a day after I saved my document?

entry.content:
Hi all,

how can we hard code bill to address for a PO in SAP public cloud?

entry.title: Re: How to import master data from Datasphere to SAC

entry.title: SAP S/4 Migration
entry.content: S/4 Migration Project – insight into running parallel S/4 projects and how that impacts SAP landscapes and processes to ensure alignment and retrofit in a possible (N+2) scenario would be helpful.

entry.title: How to Enable OAuth for OData APIs in SAP S/4HANA 2023 Trial Appliance?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently evaluating SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 using the Fully-Activated Trial Appliance (deployed via SAP CAL). The appliance stack includes:

  • SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01

  • SAP HANA DB 2.0

  • Accessed via Windows Remote Desktop

  • SAP GUI version: SAP Logon 64-bit

As part of this evaluation, I want to explore securing OData APIs using OAuth 2.0. My goal is to understand how to enable and test OAuth-protected access to standard OData APIs such as API_BUSINESS_PARTNER.

What I’ve Done So Far:

  • Logged into the system using BPINST, client 100 via SAP GUI.

  • Attempted to access the transaction /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE to activate or check services.

  • However, executing /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE does not open anything, and I suspect this could be due to missing authorizations or incorrect user context.

  • I am also unsure which user or role is required to configure OAuth client setup (e.g., via /n/IWFND/OAUTH2_CLIENT_* transactions).

Request:

  • What is the correct user or role to use for configuring OAuth 2.0 for OData APIs in this trial setup?

  • How can I access the SAP Gateway Service Maintenance (/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE) screen if it doesn't open via BPINST?

  • Are there any additional steps or prerequisites required in the trial appliance to enable OAuth functionality for OData APIs?

Any guidance, especially specific to this trial environment, would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Handling ONB2.0 rehires in SailPoint
entry.content: Hi, Can you share a sample of the business rules you created for this field? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Instance creation for apiportal-apiaccess plan in btp trial fails
entry.content: still not fixed. Someone from SAP should look into this.

entry.title: Re: MSSQL DB - Drive X 90% full - alerts
entry.content: Hi mamartins, We received an alert about the sapdata3 file is 97% full. I see there is auto growth enabled with 10 MB and maximum file size is unlimited. Please let me know what action needs to be done so that the alert does not trigger
